input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>The video cuts from a black screen to a close-up of a white bowl containing spaghetti salad with pink ham and green vegetables. Graphic overlays appear, including large red letters "SE" and vertical "STYLE" on the left, grey "COOKIN" on the right, and cursive text at the bottom reading "Spaghetti Salad" and "Cooking Japanese Style.</think><answer></answer>

[2-4] Red text expands to "NESE" then "PANESE". Grey text becomes "COOKING" with subtext "DELICIOUS HOME COOK RECIPI". Vertical "STYLE" text persists.
[4-6] Red text completes "JAPANESE" beside "STYLE" and "COOKING". Large overlays vanish, leaving only cursive text. The white bowl remains completely static.
[6-8] A brown raccoon puppet wearing steampunk goggles enters the frame in the bottom right corner. It animates slightly, moving its head and opening its mouth.
[8-10] The puppet closes its eyes and tilts its head slightly while smiling. Brown goggles stay on its forehead.
[10-12] The puppet's eyes transition from open to closed while maintaining a slight smile throughout.
[12-14] Puppet opens eyes from closed position. Mouth maintains slight smile. The bowl and cursive text overlay remain completely static and unchanged.

[14-24] A white bowl of spaghetti salad is displayed with the text "Spaghetti Salad Cooking Japanese Style" in the bottom left. A brown furry puppet wearing steampunk goggles sits in the bottom right corner, smiling with eyes open. The puppet blinks, closing its eyes then opening them again, while tilting its head slightly against the static background.
[24-26] The view switches to a kitchen counter with a blue and white striped cloth holding glass bowls of sliced onions, yellow mayonnaise, and pink ham strips. Green cucumber, spice jars, and a pasta package are also present. An overlay lists: "Ingredients 1/2 Japanese cucumber or small cucumber 1pkg ham 1/4 sliced onions 2tbsp of Japanese mayonnaise 100g of short spaghetti noodle or regular is fine salt and pepper". The puppet remains in the bottom right, eyes closed then opening.

[26-28] Kitchen counter scene with blue/white striped cloth and ingredient text overlay. Brown furry puppet wearing goggles in bottom right transitions from closed to open eyes while smiling. [28-34] Metal pot of boiling water appears on stove. Hand pours and sprinkles salt into bubbling liquid. Text overlay reads: "Boil some water, add some salt when water starts to boil. Then add your spaghetti noodles. (Please make sure to check the package on your timing for the spaghetti." Puppet smiles with closed eyes, then opens them. [34-40] Pot continues boiling vigorously. Hand vanishes then returns holding yellow bowl. Text remains static. Puppet maintains open-eyed smile with slight head movement in bottom right corner.

[40-48] A hand pours dry yellow spaghetti noodles from a silver bowl into a metal pot of boiling water. White text instructs: "Boil some water, add some salt when water starts to boil. Then add your spaghetti noodles. (Please make sure to check the package on your timing for the spaghetti." A brown furry puppet with goggles smiles with open eyes in the bottom right. [48-50] The text disappears, and the puppet closes its eyes while smiling. [50-54] The scene shifts to a stainless steel sink with a white plastic colander. A hand holds the pot over the sink as text appears: "Now that the spaghetti is done, drain the water and shake out the excess water." The hand tilts the pot to pour out cloudy water while the puppet remains smiling with closed eyes.

recent_thinks: [54-56] A hand continues tilting a metal pot over a stainless steel sink to drain cloudy water. White text instructions about draining spaghetti persist at the bottom of the screen. The brown furry puppet with steampunk goggles remains in the lower right corner, maintaining closed eyes and a smile.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>

   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text:
[0-2] Video cuts from black to a white bowl of spaghetti salad with pink ham and green vegetable pieces. Overlays appear: red "SE", vertical "STYLE", grey "COOKIN", and cursive "Spaghetti Salad / Cooking Japanese Style".
[2-4] Red text expands to "NESE" then "PANESE". Grey text becomes "COOKING" with subtext "DELICIOUS HOME COOK RECIPI". Vertical "STYLE" text persists.
[4-6] Red text completes "JAPANESE" beside "STYLE" and "COOKING". Large overlays vanish, leaving only cursive text. The white bowl remains completely static.
[6-8] A brown raccoon puppet wearing steampunk goggles enters the frame in the bottom right corner. It animates slightly, moving its head and opening its mouth.
[8-10] The puppet closes its eyes and tilts its head slightly while smiling. Brown goggles stay on its forehead.
[10-12] The puppet's eyes transition from open to closed while maintaining a slight smile throughout.
[12-14] Puppet opens eyes from closed position. Mouth maintains slight smile. The bowl and cursive text overlay remain completely static and unchanged.

[14-24] A white bowl of spaghetti salad is displayed with the text "Spaghetti Salad Cooking Japanese Style" in the bottom left. A brown furry puppet wearing steampunk goggles sits in the bottom right corner, smiling with eyes open. The puppet blinks, closing its eyes then opening them again, while tilting its head slightly against the static background.
[24-26] The view switches to a kitchen counter with a blue and white striped cloth holding glass bowls of sliced onions, yellow mayonnaise, and pink ham strips. Green cucumber, spice jars, and a pasta package are also present. An overlay lists: "Ingredients 1/2 Japanese cucumber or small cucumber 1pkg ham 1/4 sliced onions 2tbsp of Japanese mayonnaise 100g of short spaghetti noodle or regular is fine salt and pepper". The puppet remains in the bottom right, eyes closed then opening.

[26-28] Kitchen counter scene with blue/white striped cloth and ingredient text overlay. Brown furry puppet wearing goggles in bottom right transitions from closed to open eyes while smiling. [28-34] Metal pot of boiling water appears on stove. Hand pours and sprinkles salt into bubbling liquid. Text overlay reads: "Boil some water, add some salt when water starts to boil. Then add your spaghetti noodles. (Please make sure to check the package on your timing for the spaghetti." Puppet smiles with closed eyes, then opens them. [34-40] Pot continues boiling vigorously. Hand vanishes then returns holding yellow bowl. Text remains static. Puppet maintains open-eyed smile with slight head movement in bottom right corner.

[40-48] A hand pours dry yellow spaghetti noodles from a silver bowl into a metal pot of boiling water. White text instructs: "Boil some water, add some salt when water starts to boil. Then add your spaghetti noodles. (Please make sure to check the package on your timing for the spaghetti." A brown furry puppet with goggles smiles with open eyes in the bottom right. [48-50] The text disappears, and the puppet closes its eyes while smiling. [50-54] The scene shifts to a stainless steel sink with a white plastic colander. A hand holds the pot over the sink as text appears: "Now that the spaghetti is done, drain the water and shake out the excess water." The hand tilts the pot to pour out cloudy water while the puppet remains smiling with closed eyes.

[54-60] A hand drains cloudy water from a metal pot in a stainless steel sink while text reads "Now that the spaghetti is done, drain the water and shake out the excess water." The brown furry puppet with steampunk goggles smiles with closed eyes. The hand lifts a white plastic colander filled with yellow spaghetti and empties it into a silver metal bowl as text changes to "Then put the noodles in a bowl." The puppet opens its eyes.
[60-68] The text truncates to "bowl." and the puppet closes its eyes. The scene shifts to a metal tray holding glass bowls with ham, yellow sauce, and onions. A hand pours green cucumber slices from a glass bowl onto the central bowl of spaghetti. Text displays "Now we are ready to add all our other ingredients. In any order is fine." The puppet opens its eyes, then closes them again while smiling as the cucumbers are deposited.

recent_thinks: [68-70] A hand pours sliced white onions from a clear glass bowl into the central metal bowl containing spaghetti and cucumbers. The instructional text overlay vanishes from the bottom of the screen. The brown puppet in the lower right corner closes its eyes while maintaining a smile.

[70-72] A hand pours sliced white onions from a clear glass bowl into the central metal bowl containing spaghetti and cucumbers. The remaining text overlay fragments disappear completely from the bottom of the screen. The brown furry puppet wearing goggles in the lower right corner closes its eyes while maintaining a smile.
